    "Wrong gasket type/material installed for the specified service fluid and pressure-temperature rating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the assembly process immediately.",
    "Verify the correct gasket material specification from the piping class or OEM service information.",

    "Clean flange faces and inspect for damage before installing the correct gasket."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing an incorrect gasket material for the service conditions violates ASME PCC-1 assembly guidelines and ASME B16.5 pressure-temperature rating compatibility, posing a high risk of joint failure, leakage, or blowout once the system is pressurized.",

    "ASME B16.5"
  ]
